name: City Of Washington Auditorium
description: City Of Washington Auditorium is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Washington, MO. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Four Rivers YMCA
description: Four Rivers YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Washington, MO. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play.

name: James E. Pounds Tennis Center at Phoenix Park
description: Come play pickleball at James E. Pounds Tennis Center at Phoenix Park in Washington, MO! There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: New Haven City Park
description: Come play pickleball at New Haven City Park in New Haven, MO! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.

name: St. Clair Open Play- City Hall
description: Come play pickleball at St. Clair Open Play- City Hall in St. Clair, MO! There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Union City Park
description: Come play pickleball at Union City Park in Union, MO! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.
